title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date, release notes no wifi [New]
scenario: Release Notes link in App Settings > General > About shows offline error dialog when tapped without internet connection
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
4. Ensure the device is offline (no internet connection).
expected: A dialog should appear with the message: "Information about this update isn't available at the moment." and an OK button to dismiss it.
